author: mark
text:
skill: document JSON shape per --json command

Scripting section said prime/ready/list/show all accept --json but
did not describe the top-level shape each one returns. prime is an
object with a `ready` key, while ready/list are bare arrays — an
easy spot to trip on. Add a shape table covering the four documented
commands plus `bl dep tree --json`, and call out the specific `ready`
key foot-gun.
